source: WikiText-2 validation (Salesforce/wikitext, wikitext-2-v1), body paragraphs of the first 3 articles joined with blank-line separators.
notes: Deterministic perplexity slice. Feed tokens[0..N-2] through ModelRunner.step() in order; the target for the i-th logits is tokens[i+1]. Do NOT reshuffle. Regenerate via Scripts/pretokenize_wikitext.py --model gemma.
